tmux-runtime.name: Tmux Runtime Layer
tmux-runtime.description: Use when implementing tmux-based worker processes, adding new agent types to the tmux runtime, debugging session lifecycle or output capture, tracing the pre-exit flush mechanism, or understanding the fs.watch sentinel completion pattern. Keywords: tmux, session, worker, spawn, wrapper, sentinel, staleness, fs.watch, send-keys, output capture, jq, flushPendingFiles, readdirSync.

tmux-infrastructure.name: Tmux Abstraction Layer
tmux-infrastructure.description: Foundational tmux abstraction layer: TmuxSessionManager, TmuxConnector (fs.watch sentinel/message detection), TmuxHooks (wrapper script generation), TmuxValidator. Phase 1 of 10-phase tmux migration.
